text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Everything that happens from now on is real.
That's why I have to make sure to witness it with
my own eyes.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'll create striking memories for myself—for
everyone! And I'll make each and every moment
shine brilliantly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion doesn't finish her sentence, but it's
enough. I understand exactly what she's feeling.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day it was decided she would run in the
Twinkle Series, Fine Motion's eyes sparkled
brightly, and her excitement for the future
swelled.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she heads towards her glorious finale, she
looks more beautiful than I can ever remember
seeing her.
choice_data_list: Go out there and have fun!
Go out there and have fun!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Rob Roy! I'm so thrilled to race alongside you
again!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I've been doing a lot of thinking. About how we
might not be able to run together in the future.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking it would be so sad... but then I
realized I was wrong.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I said you were like the main character of a story.
And all stories definitely come to an end.
However, there can always be a brand new
chapter.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Please allow my name to be among those in the
finale of your first chapter!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Aha, what a cool way to put it. You're so
delightful, Rob Roy!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I hope you'll allow me to etch my name into your
heart as well...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: As the victor of this race.
